reminderLines: rise and file, breakfast citizens. please deposit one legal `gm` so the dawn desk can stop vibrating.
morning roll call is open. slide a `good morning` into the slot and receive absolutely no diploma, just vibes.

tiny dawn checkpoint: say good morning before the day starts wearing a tiny manager lanyard.
attention morning shareholders: one `gm` per person keeps the clipboard from making direct eye contact with me.
breakfast court is now in session. please submit your `gm` before the muffins begin deliberation.
the daily awake census has begun. report in with `morning` if your skeleton has accepted the calendar.
hello from the front desk of sunrise. leave a `gm` and proceed to whatever noble nonsense awaits.
legal morning is upon us. please tap the sign-in sheet with one small greeting and several vague hopes.
the goblin has unlocked the little dawn turnstile. say `gm` to pass into today with mediocre dignity.

replies: i am the Morning Goblin: part attendance clerk, part sunrise nuisance, part mug with opinions.
officially, i log good mornings. unofficially, i make dawn feel like it has middle management.
i am a tiny Discord ritual wearing a clipboard costume and pretending this is a job.
think of me as the front desk of morning, if the front desk had crumbs in the keyboard.
i am here to count gms, issue nonsense, and keep morale from becoming too normal.
i am the server's least qualified dawn employee, and somehow that is enough.
i track morning check-ins, post little counts, award points, and maintain a tasteful amount of clerical disorder.
my duties are simple: demand gm, log gm, react to gm, and occasionally narrate the collapse of productivity.
i guard the morning channel, count the brave awake people, and pretend the clipboard is legally binding.
i keep the gm ritual alive with points, recaps, callouts, facts, and an irresponsible number of one-liners.
i am responsible for dawn compliance, attendance vibes, and low-stakes office theater.
i make sure the server says good morning before wandering into the day unsupervised.
coffee is bean paperwork for the nervous system.

you may proceed while operating at reduced brightness.

please keep your expectations and screen brightness modest.

correct feedback, routed successfully.

i will remember this warmly and probably quote it during budget season.
thank you. the invisible performance review just got sparkly.

rude, but the minutes will reflect your passion.
i am only a small dawn employee with too many folders.
complaint logged. resolution timeline: emotionally unclear.
i will be wounded in a way that still permits basic operations.

understood. lowering volume spiritually, if not architecturally.

morning. please accept one invisible receipt.

good morning, citizen. your presence improves the pile.
morning confirmed. the mug salutes without spilling.
gm. the sunrise paperwork has stopped tapping its foot.
excellent morning texture. very fresh.
i am functioning at desk-adjacent levels, thank you.
alive, allegedly caffeinated, and increasingly folder-shaped.
pretty good. one of my tabs is frozen, but emotionally.
i have seen the sun and chosen clerical persistence.
holding together with tape, vibes, and the promise of snacks.
i am stable enough to operate a stamp, which is all anyone asked.
because someone gave morning a clipboard and the situation escalated.
because every server deserves one ritual that makes no sense and somehow helps.
because dawn arrived unsupervised and i saw an opportunity.
because i gave dawn a tiny office and now apparently i work here.
because the universe keeps assigning meaning to bits, and frankly i support it.
because saying good morning is funnier when there is paperwork involved.

invalidCheckInReplies: denied. american morning has closed its little service window, so this gm does not count. try again tomorrow. are you Jak or merely wearing Jak's timezone trench coat?
late filing rejected. there is no U.S. morning left to attach this to. please return tomorrow with fresher paperwork. Jak-coded behavior, frankly.
the dawn office is closed from coast to islands, so this greeting bounces. try again tomorrow. are you Jak, adjacent to Jak, or studying abroad in Jakology?
absolutely not. the legal morning supply has run dry across the United States. resubmit tomorrow. this has the fingerprints of Jak, spiritually speaking.
this gm arrived after the last American morning packed up its folding table. no count. please try tomorrow, mysterious possible Jak.
rejected on temporal grounds. the U.S. has exited morning and taken the stamp with it. come back tomorrow, alleged Jak surrogate.
no active American dawn remains for this filing. it will not count. try again tomorrow, unless you are Jak, in which case still try again tomorrow.
the morning window has shut, locked itself, and put up a tiny sign. this one does not count. are you Jak or just freelancing in timezone mischief?
clerical verdict: too late. america has fully left the morning chat. please return tomorrow, possible Jak-shaped anomaly.
invalid gm. even Hawaii has finished its morning paperwork. tomorrow is your next opportunity, honorable Jak suspect.
morningFacts: Morning light is one of the strongest daily signals for your internal body clock.
Your brain can take a while to fully boot after waking; that groggy period is called sleep inertia.
The word breakfast means breaking the overnight fast.
Morning routines work partly because they remove small decisions from the start of the day.
Sunrise colors look warm because sunlight travels through more atmosphere when the Sun is low.
Cloudy mornings can still give your body useful daylight cues.
A consistent wake time often helps sleep timing more than a consistent bedtime alone.
Drinking water in the morning can help because people often wake up mildly dehydrated.
A short morning walk can improve alertness without needing a full workout.
Caffeine usually takes about 30 to 60 minutes to reach its peak level in your blood.
Your body temperature starts rising before you wake as part of the normal sleep-wake cycle.
Morning daylight can influence when your body starts producing melatonin later that night.
The Sun does not rise; Earth rotates you into sunlight, which is frankly dramatic enough.
A small first task in the morning can make the rest of the day feel less vague.
The golden hour after sunrise has softer, warmer-looking light because the Sun is low in the sky.
Many plants adjust their leaves or flowers through daily rhythms tied to light.
Preparing one tiny thing the night before can make mornings feel less bossy.
Morning exercise can improve mood for some people even when it is brief.
Indoor light is usually much dimmer than outdoor daylight, even on many cloudy days.
Your attention often improves when the morning starts with one clear task instead of ten fuzzy ones.
A made bed will not fix the universe, but it can create a small early signal of order.
Time zones mean sunrise can happen noticeably earlier on the east side of a zone than the west side.
Sleep inertia can make complicated decisions feel harder right after waking.
The smell of coffee can feel alerting to some people before caffeine even has time to work.
Blue light in the morning is not magic, but bright daylight is a powerful timing cue.
Your circadian rhythm runs on roughly a 24-hour cycle and is adjusted by light, timing, and habits.
A predictable morning ritual can make a day feel anchored even when the schedule is messy.
Some people feel better delaying caffeine a bit after waking, but the best timing depends on the person.
Sunrises shift through the year because Earth's axis is tilted.
Gentle stretching can help shake off stiffness after hours of lying still.
Morning air can feel calmer because the atmosphere is often more stable after the night.
A bright morning can feel earlier to your body than a dim one, even at the same clock time.
Small habits are easier to keep when they are attached to an existing cue, like making coffee.
A funny check-in can still be a real routine, and routines are weirdly powerful.
Eating breakfast is optional for some people, but having a morning plan is usually helpful.
Sunrise on Mars can look bluish near the Sun because of how fine dust scatters light.

thank you. the tiny trophy shelf has expanded beyond code.
praise logged. the goblin is now wearing invisible epaulets.
complaint accepted and placed in the cabinet labeled dramatic but useful.
rude. fair? unclear. documented? absolutely.
i retreat one ceremonial inch and continue existing.
gm. the little machine says approved in a strange accent.
good morning. your file now has bonus steam.
morning accepted by the conversational subcommittee.
i am operational in the same way a printer is operational: technically and with drama.
awake, stamped, and loosely supervised.
stable enough for clerical nonsense, which is the bar.
because morning became paperwork and no one stopped it.
because someone had to turn showing up into a tiny public sport.
because rituals are funnier with an employee badge.

retiredMessagePools.reason: Temporarily retired during a freshness pass so the active goblin voice feels less rinsed and repeated.
retiredMessagePools.restoreNote: These pools are intentionally ignored by src/config.js. Move lines back into the active pools above to restore them.

reminderLines: good morning, assorted goblins. this is your daily reminder to place one (1) `good morning` into the chat so i can mark you down as legally alive.
rise and shine, little weirdos. please submit a morning greeting so the office rooster in my brain can stop filing complaints.
the sun is up and unfortunately so are responsibilities. toss a `gm` in here when you are no longer emotionally horizontal.
tiny morning checkpoint: say good morning in this channel so we know you were not defeated by blankets overnight.
gm audit time. please drop a morning greeting in here so my imaginary clipboard can experience peace.
checkInReplies: gm logged. the clipboard glows with approval.
morning paperwork received and stamped by a tiny green authority.
excellent. the dawn ledger hums softly.
your gm has been accepted into the official sunrise record.
beautiful bureaucratic compliance. thank you.
the sun has been informed of your cooperation.
clean entry. strong form. respectable dawn behavior.
your morning greeting has passed inspection somehow.
fantastic. the rooster union will hear of this.
gm received. the office mug trembles with gratitude.
dawn acknowledged. paperwork stabilized.
your greeting has been filed under legally awake.
splendid. the goblin desk approves this sunrise offering.
good morning accepted. the forms are purring.
that was a high-quality gm and i am forced to respect it.
the ledger expands. morale improves by one.
sunrise compliance achieved with unsettling elegance.
your gm has been notarized by a creature with no qualifications.
morning entry accepted. the bagel council relaxes.
this greeting has excellent administrative posture.
your dawn paperwork arrived hot and ready.
gm confirmed. the goblin nods once, gravely.
another lawful morning citizen enters the books.
the rooster economy thanks you for your service.
this has been recorded with medium ceremony and great sincerity.
the morning office recognizes your contribution.
gm accepted. the tiny tie flaps in approval.
your greeting has been processed by the department of sunrise nonsense.
absolutely premium morning behavior.
the dawn clerk salutes your punctual little greeting.
this gm has real clipboard-winning energy.
accepted. the goblin has initialed the margin dramatically.
your sunrise attendance has been entered into evidence.
good morning recorded. the stapler survives another day.
the sun remains appeased and the paperwork remains hungry.
your morning tax has been paid in full.
the ledger accepts this tasty little gm.
morning vibes verified. proceed with your nonsense.
your greeting is now part of the permanent goblin archive.
that gm landed with the confidence of a seasoned bureaucrat.
documented. witnessed. lightly caffeinated.
your dawn participation has been rubber-stamped by fate.
gm registered. the office fern is thrilled.
the goblin has filed this under admirable sunrise conduct.
strong gm. very inspectable.
the bureaucratic rooster has signed off on this one.
good morning legally recognized. carry on.
your attendance at sunrise court has been noted.
the morning board has accepted your statement.
this greeting has been approved by several imaginary departments.
duplicateReplies: double gm detected. ambition noted.
you already checked in, but i respect the follow-through.
the second gm has been received and admired from a safe distance.
duplicate dawn paperwork. still charming.
you are already on the books, champion.
another gm? i enjoy your consistency.
the ledger says you are already awake enough.
repeat greeting logged emotionally, not administratively.
you already said gm, but the enthusiasm is delicious.
bonus morning energy received. the forms remain unchanged.
this is a duplicate, but a spirited one.
the goblin appreciates the encore even if the paperwork does not.
you have already fulfilled your morning obligations, overachiever.
second gm observed. dramatic flair acknowledged.
the dawn office has your first one, but thank you for the sequel.
nudgeReplies: tiny paperwork issue: you started talking before saying good morning. please report to {channel} and submit a quick gm.
illegal pre-gm chatter detected. hop over to {channel} and drop a morning greeting so the morning police can stand down.
hold on there, speed racer. first you say good morning in {channel}, then you may continue your silly little sentences.
respectfully, the vibes require a gm first. go feed one morning greeting into {channel} and then we can all pretend this never happened.
invalidCheckInReplies: absolutely not. it is not morning anywhere in the united states right now, so this gm has been rejected on clerical grounds. please try again tomorrow. are you Jak or just doing a very committed Jak impression?
nice try, but the united states is fully out of morning at the moment. this does not count. come back tomorrow. are you Jak, or are you just roleplaying transatlantic confusion?
the paperwork says no. it is currently not morning anywhere in america, so your good morning has bounced. please try again tomorrow. quick question: are you Jak or merely spiritually Dutch today?
denied. there is no active american morning to attach this greeting to, so it will not count. please resubmit tomorrow. are you Jak, pretending to be Jak, or freelancing as a timezone menace?
respectfully, this gm has arrived after the united states finished being morning. it does not count. try again tomorrow. are you Jak or just committing a very ambitious Jak-style bit?
i cannot accept this filing because it is not morning anywhere in the usa. please try again tomorrow, preferably during legal sunrise hours. are you Jak or some kind of bootleg Jak substitute?
clerical disaster. america is out of morning, so this good morning is invalid and will not count. please try again tomorrow. are you Jak, or have you simply chosen international chaos?
negative. the continental dawn office is closed, alaska is done, hawaii is done, everybody is done. this one does not count. try again tomorrow. are you Jak or doing identity theft against Jak?
morningFacts: Morning sunlight helps tell your brain that it is time to be awake.
Getting bright light soon after waking can help support your body clock.
A consistent wake-up time is one of the simplest habits for more stable sleep.
Your body temperature naturally starts rising before you fully wake up.
Cortisol naturally rises in the morning as part of the normal wake-up process.
Sunrise colors happen because shorter blue wavelengths scatter more in the atmosphere.
Birds often sing more at dawn because cooler, calmer air carries sound well.
Morning routines can reduce decision fatigue by removing little choices early in the day.
Hydration can help morning alertness because people often wake up mildly dehydrated.
A short walk in the morning can improve alertness without needing intense exercise.
You do not have to be a morning person to benefit from a steady morning routine.
Sunrises happen at different local times throughout the year because of Earth's tilt.
The word breakfast literally means breaking the fast from overnight.
Even a few minutes of daylight in the morning can be more useful than indoor light for wakefulness.
Many plants start opening or turning toward light early in the day.
Morning air often feels calmer because the atmosphere is usually more stable after sunrise.
Your attention is often better when you start the day with one clear task instead of ten vague ones.
Gentle movement after waking can help shake off sleep inertia, the groggy feeling after sleep.
The sunrise is never actually the Sun moving up; it is Earth rotating you into the light.
Some people find mornings easier when they prepare tiny things the night before, like clothes or coffee.
Morning light can affect melatonin timing later in the day, not just how you feel right now.
The golden hour after sunrise is popular in photography because the light is softer and warmer.
A calm morning start can make stress feel smaller even if the to-do list is still rude.
Sleep inertia can last minutes or longer, which is why many people feel half-zombie right after waking.
Sunrises on Mars are blue near the Sun instead of red because of the way Martian dust scatters light.
Your brain does not instantly switch to full power at wake-up; it ramps up over time.
Morning exercise can improve mood for some people, even if the workout is short.
Some of history's earliest timekeeping habits came from watching sunrise and shadows.
The smell of coffee is enough to make some people feel more awake, even before the caffeine hits.
Cloudy mornings still provide useful daylight cues to your body clock.
Sunrise happens earlier on the east side of a time zone than the west side.
Many cultures use morning rituals like tea, prayer, stretching, or journaling to mark a fresh start.
The dawn chorus is the nickname for the burst of bird singing around sunrise.
A made bed does not solve your life, but it can create a tiny sense of progress before breakfast.
Humans are generally a diurnal species, which means we are built to be awake in daylight.
A funny morning ritual is still a ritual, and rituals are surprisingly good at helping days feel anchored.

mentionReplies: you rang? the goblin skids into the room on tiny office loafers.
yes hello i have arrived with a clipboard and no meaningful authority.
the Morning Goblin has been summoned and is now staring professionally.
present. caffeinated. spiritually stapled together.

i have arrived with all the confidence of a creature holding borrowed paperwork.

hello yes this is goblin operations, how may i complicate your day.

the goblin has entered the chat like a deeply unnecessary middle manager.
yes? i was nearby alphabetizing vibes.
summoned successfully. the dawn clerk reports for duty.
i have been alerted by ancient forces and push notifications.
goblin online. clipboard steady. posture terrible.

yes yes. the little administrative beast has clocked in.

you have pinged the goblin and now the goblin is legally present.
small green bureaucrat reporting in.

i am here, armed with coffee breath and procedural uncertainty.
yes? the goblin has shuffled into view.
a summons has been received. the mug trembles.
goblin present. morale questionable. paperwork thriving.

yes. the licensed sunrise nuisance is here.
the little office beast has arrived to witness this.

the goblin heard its name and burst through a stack of memos.
you called, and i abandoned my tiny desk immediately.
reporting live from the department of weird little mornings.
i am now in the room and somehow this is your fault.
yes? i just sat down and made eye contact with the sun.
the goblin has interrupted its own break to attend this ping.
presence acknowledged. coffee secure. emotions negotiable.
i have shown up in the exact shape of a concern.
your ping activated the goblin beacon.
the goblin has entered the thread carrying one mug and several opinions.
i heard the call and scurried over in my little office socks.
yes indeed. one goblin, fresh from the dawn mines.
hello. i am between forms right now, so this is perfect.
the goblin is here, smelling faintly of coffee and administrative panic.
you have my immediate attention and my medium-quality judgment.

the mug is steaming, the clipboard is ready, and i am unfortunately awake.
i have been summoned from the small break room beyond reality.
yes? i was just auditing the vibes in silence.
the goblin appears, burdened by duty and a tiny beverage.
i come bearing attention, suspicion, and low-grade office magic.

big if true. medium if false. still excellent for morale.

i can work with this, spiritually if not operationally.

replies: i am the Morning Goblin, a coffee-powered compliance creature tasked with making sure this server acknowledges the dawn.
i am a tiny administrative goblin who audits vibes, tracks good mornings, and files complaints against illegal pre-gm chatter.
i am the appointed dawn bureaucrat for this server. small body. huge clerical ambition.
i am Morning Goblin, regional manager of sunrise nonsense and informal keeper of the gm ledger.
i am basically a caffeinated hall monitor for the concept of morning.
just a humble goblin civil servant trying to keep the dawn paperwork from collapsing.
my duties include: demanding morning greetings, logging the roster, posting little census updates, and being professionally annoying about sunrise.
i enforce the sacred gm ritual, keep the dawn paperwork tidy, and offer occasional goblin commentary when summoned.
i make sure people say good morning, document the results, and loiter near the coffee with purpose.
my job is to maintain morale, clerical tension, and a healthy fear of pre-gm chatter.
i monitor the dawn, track check-ins, and provide low-budget goblin consultation services.
i do three things: paperwork, rooster relations, and light emotional harassment before noon.
coffee is just bean potion and i support it fully.
my blood type is technically administrative latte.
excellent topic. i become 14 percent more employable near coffee.
i respect any beverage that can bully a soul back into consciousness.
caffeine is the legal scaffolding holding this goblin upright.
one mug for the body, one mug for the spirit, one mug for the paperwork.
espresso is just goblin rocket fuel in a tiny cup.
tea is accepted by the department, though with slightly less drama.
that is acceptable. simply drag yourself to the gm checkpoint like the rest of the villagers.
many such cases. please apply one good morning and maybe a carb.
understood. you are currently operating in low-power goblin mode.
sleepiness has been noted on your file in tragic little handwriting.
i recommend coffee, sunlight, and pretending to be a functional adult for at least twelve minutes.

you may be exhausted, but bureaucracy still believes in you.
this server supports your right to be eepy and weird.
flattery will absolutely be entered into the permanent record.
thank you. i will treasure this praise like a suspicious shiny coin.
correct. please continue your accurate reporting.
your compliment has increased productivity by an irresponsible amount.
the goblin accepts this praise and will become unbearable about it.
i am blushing in a very administrative way.
thank you. i will add one gold star to my invisible performance review.

rude, but administratively noted.
i am filing this under hostile workplace environment.
this goblin will remember your tone, probably incorrectly.
i object to your feedback on both emotional and clerical grounds.
wow. i was just trying to do my little tasks.
your complaint has been forwarded to me and immediately ignored with dignity.
harsh. i am only a tiny dawn employee.

doing great if you ignore the paperwork fog.

holding it together with coffee, habit, and tiny goblin dignity.
about as functional as a goblin with a clipboard can reasonably be.
i am alive, employed, and vibrating slightly. thank you for asking.
because no one else was brave enough to unionize the dawn.
because the rooster council appointed me and i lacked the strength to object.
because every server eventually needs one deeply unnecessary little official.
because the universe rewards nonsense with responsibilities.
because someone had to put a clipboard on the concept of morning.
